title: Sample breastfeeding day meal plan
excerpt: Energy and nutrient needs while nursing, a one-day Vietnamese-friendly menu, and hydration reminders.
content:
## Needs

Higher calories and continued calcium, iodine, protein, and fluids. Eat to hunger with nutrient-dense choices.

## Sample day

- Breakfast: phở gà (fully cooked chicken) or egg rice.
- Snack: yogurt + fruit.
- Lunch: rice, steamed fish, stir-fried morning glory (rau muống), soup.
- Snack: peanut butter toast or nuts (if no allergy).
- Dinner: lean pork stew (thịt kho), rice, cucumber.
- Evening: warm milk or soup; water throughout the day.

## Notes

Caffeine in moderation; alcohol passes into milk — avoid or limit per advice. Adjust portions to appetite.

metaDescription: One-day meal ideas for nursing parents — protein, calcium, fluids, and snacks.
author: Bầu Ăn Gì? Team
